case_title: THOMAS HRESKO VS. MICKEY BAILEY DBA MICKEY BAILEY CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTY. GOLD RAISED HIS OPPOSITION REGARDING ATTY. BRYNE'S WITHDRAWING FROM THE CASE. THE COURT VIEWED HIS OPPOSITION AS NOT THE ISSUE IN THIS CASE. THERE WAS ALSO NO PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE ON MR. GOLD. ATTY. MARK D. BYRNE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS PLAINTIFF THOMAS HRESKO'S COUNSEL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN CSR# 10276 301/PJB

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK D. BYRNE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF TRIANO & BYRNE, TEL. NO. 371-8000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT HARLAN GOLD OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GOLD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 337-0635 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - ATTY. GOLD RAISED HIS OPPOSITION REGARDING ATTY. BRYNE'S WITHDRAWING FROM THE CASE. THE COURT VIEWED HIS OPPOSITION AS NOT THE ISSUE IN THIS CASE. THERE WAS ALSO NO PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE ON MR. GOLD. ATTY. MARK D. BYRNE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS PLAINTIFF THOMAS HRESKO'S Counsel IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Jacqueline Chan CSR# 10276 =301/PJB
